concept: Omnigent is a Python‑based meta‑harness that unifies multiple LLM agent SDKs (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Pi, etc.) behind a common executor and session layer.
inspiration_angle: Omnigent blends the LangChain‑style tool‑calling model with a real‑time collaborative session layer, taking the plug‑in pattern seen in VS Code extensions and applying it to LLM SDKs, thereby enabling on‑the‑fly swapping of vendor back‑ends without code changes.
